issue_title: Free text for single-select not working
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
When editing the settings for a single-select column, the admin is given the choice to enable adding new select-options for other users. While this works for multi-select, it doesn't for single-select - on purpose, [it seems?](https://github.com/AntlerVC/firetable/blob/fd036f59
test_description_zh: 在表格中配置一个单选(Single Select)列，开启允许用户自由输入新选项的设置。然后以普通用户身份编辑该列的单元格，尝试在单选下拉框中手动输入一个不在预设选项列表中的新值，观察是否能成功添加并保存该新选项。
expected_result_zh: 开启自由文本输入后，用户在单选(Single Select)列的下拉框中手动输入新的选项值时，应能成功创建并选中该新选项，行为与多选(Multi Select)列的自由文本输入功能一致。
